introSection: Pippin, originally known as Giant Coaster, was a roller coaster previously located at Summit Beach Park in Akron, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: On June 9, 1929, a 17-year-old rider stood up and fell under the car, killing them instantly.

fullText:
Pippin, originally known as Giant Coaster, was a roller coaster previously located at Summit Beach Park in Akron, Ohio, USA.

On June 9, 1929, a 17-year-old rider stood up and fell under the car, killing them instantly.
